articles.title: TreeSize won't renew perpetual-license support unless users subscribe
articles.content: "Current economic conditions" have shifted TreeSize's business model.
articles.titleZh: 除非用户订阅，否则TreeSize不会续订永久许可证支持
articles.contentZh: “当前经济状况”改变了TreeSize的商业模式。

articles.title: HP fined 1.4 billion rupees for “cartelization” of ink cartridges, toner, PCs
articles.content: Resellers threatened to ditch HP printing supplies for counterfeits.
articles.titleZh: 惠普因墨盒、碳粉、个人电脑的“卡特尔化”被罚款14亿卢比
articles.contentZh: 经销商威胁要放弃惠普打印用品的假冒产品。

articles.title: Now, even Russia's most elite hackers are using Clickfix to infect devices
articles.content: The social-engineering technique has primarily been a tool of financially motivated criminals.
articles.titleZh: 现在，即使是俄罗斯最精英的黑客也在使用Clickfix来感染设备
articles.contentZh: 社交工程技术主要是出于经济动机的犯罪分子的工具。

articles.title: Energy IPOs surge as investors hunt for ways to play AI boom
articles.content: Companies coming to market are raising money at fastest pace this century.
articles.titleZh: 随着投资者寻找发挥人工智能热潮的方式，能源IPO激增
articles.contentZh: 本世纪进入市场的公司正在以最快的速度筹集资金。

articles.title: Lego’s Donkey Kong arcade machine lets Mario jump endless barrels — Miyamoto is reportedly happy
articles.content: Carl Merriam has designed some of my favorite nostalgia-inducing Lego sets, including the Lego Nintendo Game Boy and Piranha Plant. He's assisted on the incredible Lion Knights' Castle, Galaxy Explorer, and Pirates of Barracuda Bay. Now, he's helped the company create a $200 Donkey Kong arcade machine set that managed to win even Mario creator […]
articles.titleZh: 乐高的Donkey Kong街机让马里奥跳过无尽的桶—据报道，宫本很高兴
articles.contentZh: Carl Merriam设计了一些我最喜欢的怀旧乐高套装，包括乐高任天堂Game Boy和Piranha Plant。他协助建造了令人难以置信的狮子骑士城堡、银河探险家和梭鱼湾海盗。现在，他帮助公司创建了一套价值200 $的Donkey Kong街机套装，甚至赢得了马里奥创作者的青睐[…]

articles.title: Meta won’t have to face the next planned social media addiction trial
articles.content: Less than a week before Meta's lawyers were set to return to a Los Angeles courtroom, the plaintiff accusing the platform of inflicting harm dropped the case. Brought by 15-year-old Florida plaintiff going by initials R.K.C., the case was set to be the second in a set of bellwether trials meant to test legal arguments […]
articles.titleZh: Meta将不必面对下一次计划中的社交媒体成瘾试验
articles.contentZh: 在Meta的律师返回洛杉矶法庭前不到一周，指控平台造成伤害的原告放弃了此案。这起案件由15岁的佛罗里达州原告以首字母R.K.C.提起，将成为一系列旨在测试法律论据的领头羊审判中的第二起[…]
